node.text: We are humans in the end
You're right, at the end they're all humans, every human being needs something, U just have to find out what it is and you'll conquer them easily...
I have a friend like that now I’m practicing the same thing.
The shadow you cast depends on your mindset not on your height.
My father has this trait, he can talk to anyone without any filter, idk men how he achieved it
Be kind even to those who are unkind
You're right, at the end they're all humans, every human being needs something, U just have to find out what it is and you'll conquer them easily...

node.text:
The Face Cards 🫠

Game of Thrones (2011–2019) is a globally recognized HBO television series created by David Benioff and D. B. Weiss, based on the novel series A Song of Ice and Fire by George R. R. Martin. The show features one of the largest ensemble casts in television history, including Emilia Clarke (Daenerys Targaryen), Kit Harington (Jon Snow), Peter Dinklage (Tyrion Lannister), Lena Headey (Cersei Lannister), Nikolaj Coster-Waldau (Jaime Lannister), Sophie Turner (Sansa Stark), Maisie Williams (Arya Stark), Isaac Hempstead Wright (Bran Stark), Sean Bean (Ned Stark), Charles Dance (Tywin Lannister), Alfie Allen (Theon Greyjoy), Gwendoline Christie (Brienne of Tarth), Jason Momoa (Khal Drogo), and Pedro Pascal (Oberyn Martell).

The series became a worldwide phenomenon, earning multiple Emmy Awards and breaking viewership records throughout its eight-season run. Known for its large-scale production, iconic characters, and cultural impact, Game of Thrones remains one of the most talked-about television shows in history. It later expanded into the franchise House of the Dragon, further growing its global audience.

With its massive cast, high production value, and lasting popularity across streaming platforms and social media, Game of Thrones continues to trend through edits, clips, and fan discussions, standing alongside other legendary TV series in global entertainment history.
He's my favourite character from GOT ❤️

Photo by ྀི⋆˙⟡🦋⋆꩜｡ on March 22, 2026. May be an image of lighting, lightbulb and text that says 'Know major countries: USA, China, Russia, India Learn basic concepts: NATO, sanctions, trade, alliances AGAN Don't go deep.J Just familiarity.'.

Photo by ྀི⋆˙⟡🦋⋆꩜｡ on March 22, 2026. May be an image of lighting, lightbulb, lamp and text that says 'PHASE 2 (Days 16-35): Understand current affairs Goal: Know what's happening NOW Daily: Follow I-2 news sources (don't overload) NA'.

Photo by ྀི⋆˙⟡🦋⋆꩜｡ on March 22, 2026. node.text:
a musician applied to 65 jobs and got zero interviews. then a friend gave her a "dystopian hack" and she landed 3 part-time jobs in weeks!!

⭐word of the day: prompt injection⭐

Cami Petyn copied the entire job description from the listing, pasted it onto her resume, shrunk the font to nearly nothing, and turned the text white. invisible to human eyes. fully readable by the AI screener. 

what Cami did is a real AI vulnerability... feeding hidden instructions to a model so it behaves differently than intended. 

she didn't hack a system. she just understood how it thinks

the scary part isn't that she did it. it's that it worked 65 times over!!! 
companies are trusting AI to filter talent and the AI is being played by white text.

so here's the question...
is this cheating, or is this just knowing the rules of a broken game?

drop your thoughts below 👇 would you try this?

#promptinjection #ai #camipetyn #techtok #cybersecurity
It could common in RAG but rarely in big tech ai chats

Checkout : skillfroge.com 
For all AI Hacking Content
prompt injection model theft jail break  data exfiltration pixel flooding

node.text:
🚨GEN Z it is important whom you label as National Hero ! My review isn’t about tearing down Liaquat Ali Khan, it’s about calling out the original history rather then textbooks. I lay out his controversies, reject the ‘national hero’ label, and argue for a neutral, evidence‑based look at his record.
 #NeutralHistory #pakistan #politics #liaquatalikhan #pakarmy
Lekin ABB KIYA? Yeh baat us daur mai Q nhi ayi

The list of  National heroes.. Yahya Khan "who broke Pakistan", Ayub Khan "Sidelined bengalis", Zia "Democracy killer", Musharaf "Gave hundred of Pakistanis to American illegally", Ashfaq Pervaiz kayani "More of a american servant rather than COAS"
aap ye baat kis tarha sabit karsaktay any refrence ya chup k sun rahay thay

Yes, this is absolutely true. Once, when Quaid-e-Azam was very ill and was very close to passing away, Liaquat Ali Khan came to his house and Quaid-e-Azam sat down completely healthy and put on a show as if he was completely healthy. Fatima Jinnah told him, "You are lying down. Your health is not good." Quaid-e-Azam said, "No, you should react normally. These people want me to die quickly and the power of Pakistan to come into their hands ...
Muslim league was made by a bunch of jageerdar waddere and nawabs and they created a new colony for the Britishers and Americans so they can still have a hold on Asia 😂😂

node.text: 熱血再燃！《紅海行動》重映震撼歸來，準備好再次被腎上腺素徹底征服了嗎？🔥 第一次走進戲院的那一刻，銀幕上傳來的爆炸聲、槍響與直升機的轟鳴，瞬間將你拉進那場海外撤僑的生死戰場。緊張感像無形的鐵爪緊緊抓住你的心臟，每一次呼吸都變得沉重，每一秒鐘都像是走在鋼絲上。那種壓迫感、那種無處可逃的危機感，至今仍歷歷在目，彷彿昨天才剛經歷過。 如今，這部被譽為中國軍事動作片巔峰之作的《紅海行動》再度重映，正是時候讓你重新體驗那場讓人窒息的銀幕衝擊！蛟龍突擊隊八位硬漢，面對極端環境下的恐怖分子、武裝海盜與時間賽跑的撤僑任務，從狹窄的巷弄激烈槍戰，到被俘人質的極限營救，再到沙漠中的坦克對決與海上直升機空戰，每一場戲都毫不留情地展現真槍實彈的軍事硬核。 真實的95式突擊步槍、狙擊槍、火箭筒、無人機、裝甲車、直-8、直-20直升機……這些中國海軍現役裝備全數上陣，搭配高密度剪輯與極致音效，讓爆炸的火光直衝你的臉龐，讓子彈擦過耳邊的呼嘯聲直擊你的靈魂。戰爭的殘酷、犧牲的重量、兄弟間的生死相依，全都赤裸裸地呈現在你眼前。沒有多餘的浪漫，只有血與火的真實。Behind every filtered photo is a girl who cried in the car last week, celebrated tiny wins in silence, and whispered "you've got this" to her reflection more times than she can count. I'm not perfect, but I'm trying—trying to love the journey, the stretch marks, the plot twists, and the quiet strength it takes to keep showing up. Grateful for every version of me that got me here. 🌙✨

node.text:
The Islamabad High Court has called for amendments to the Nikahnama to ensure wives receive an equal share in assets acquired during marriage in cases of divorce or the husband’s de@th. 

Justice Mohsin Akhtar Qayyani emphasized strengthening women’s property rights and urged legal reforms to protect housewives financially. 

He also highlighted the need to educate women about their marital rights to build a more just and progressive society.

#IslamabadHighCourt #IHC #WomensRights #Nikahnama #Pakistan #Law #PropertyRights

node.text:
Some of the world’s most powerful intelligence agencies operate in secrecy, gathering critical information and shaping national security decisions far beyond public view 🌍🕵️

Mossad is known for high precision covert missions, while the Central Intelligence Agency conducts global intelligence and analysis operations. Federal Security Service focuses on counterintelligence, Research and Analysis Wing handles external intelligence, and MI6 gathers foreign intelligence across regions.

Meanwhile Ministry of State Security emphasizes surveillance and cyber intelligence, Inter-Services Intelligence plays a key regional role, and Directorate-General for External Security manages overseas intelligence operations, highlighting how nations rely on these agencies for security and strategic awareness.

#intelligence #spy #security #military

node.text:
There's a free tool that gives you a real-time CIA-style intelligence map of the entire world. 🌍🛰️🤯

It's called SitDeck - and it just launched something big.

Here's what you get on the FREE plan:

🗺️ Interactive 3D world map with 65+ live layers
✈️ Real-time military aircraft & naval tracking
💥 Live conflict zones & threat monitoring
🌊 Earthquakes, weather, nuclear reactors
🤖 AI analyst - ask questions in plain English, get sourced answers
📰 Daily AI intelligence briefing - security, markets, cyber, climate
🔔 Custom alerts for anything - earthquakes, sanctions, carrier movements
📡 180+ data providers - USGS, NOAA, NATO, CISA - zero API keys needed
⚡ Sub-60 second refresh on critical feeds

This is the kind of intelligence infrastructure that used to cost governments millions of dollars.

Now it's free. For everyone. 👀

Link in bio - or search SitDeck.

What's the first thing you'd track on this? 👇
Military movements 🛩️ / Earthquakes 🌊 / Conflict zones 💥 / Markets 📈

Video Credit: DM for credit or removal, no copyright intended.

👉FOLLOW @star.ai.media for your daily dose of future tech!

node.text:
From dreaming about it… to actually seeing myself on a cinema screen as a model 🥹🎬
At Mango Plus Cinema — this one hits different.
Grateful for every step, every shoot, every lesson.
Just getting started. ✨
Thanks to @bhargavvalera @houseofhny @hardikgohelofficial 
.
#explore #instagram #instagood #reelitfeelit #fyp

node.text:
Bacha baazi culture in KPK ? This is not culture 🏳️‍🌈not even Islam 🙏

might get a lot of hate on this video . But we should raise our voice to protect our children

Bhen !! ye Bannu ke apnay log nhi hay. Ye wazir qaum walay hay Jo waziristan aur Domel walay baqi bahir areas se atay hay . Aur ye Wazir qaum walay hay . Bannu ke apnay local log aesay nhi.  Hum ne khud in ko mana Kia hay lekin bus ye Sell Karty hay Paiso par . Aur itna bhi deep na Jaye , koi zina waghaira Nhi Karty . Bus is ko sath mey ye log ghumatay phiratay hay . Domel aur Waziristan ke Qabaili Wazir qaum walay hay sab

why tf are you putting the gay flag there? yeh tumhare mosalman bhai hain jo tumhare nabi ki sunnat par amal karte huay bachon ka r*pe karte hain just gender switch karke although larkon ko molest karne me peeche nahi tha tmhara nabi.
Sangsar karo inko. Aise beghairat logo ko ibrat ka nishana banao.

Also i tell you k ye sirf kpk main nhi hai poory Pakistan main hai I've seen so many panjabi, baloch , and sindhi people also who does this kind of thing and that  is much worse than kpk , I've told you sorf video bnana nhi hota false news ko apni research bnany sy acha hai aap logon sy interviews lain . I've appreciated your work but u need some improvement ❤️

Girl you're wrong again. I born in bannu kpk and there's nothing as you said that selling boys or something, it's all fake please toda acha research krain , i won't say k bachabazi nhi hoti , hoti hai bht hoti hai jo nahi honi chahiye , qk Qoum e loot pr isi wajha sy azaab aya Allah ki traf sy , but please i tell you again apni research ko authentic bnain . Thank you ❤️

Heard first about this at least 7-8 years ago, it’s very unfortunate and incompetent of our leaders that this goes on to this day, and they can’t save these children, and prevent many others into falling for this horrible act.
Nah wo larkion ki clgs universities me gaane band krwa rhe kion k wo ziada bari burai mfs
Sabse badi baat to yah aati jinko din pada tha kaun hai jo jo din padha rahe hain na to yah padhare ki aur ghar per Rahane ke liye sach mein bare mein baat ki audio government

Bhen !! ye Bannu ke apnay log nhi hay. Ye wazir qaum walay hay Jo waziristan aur Domel walay baqi bahir areas se atay hay . Aur ye Wazir qaum walay hay . Bannu ke apnay local log aesay nhi.  Hum ne khud in ko mana Kia hay lekin bus ye Sell Karty hay Paiso par . Aur itna bhi deep na Jaye , koi zina waghaira Nhi Karty . Bus is ko sath mey ye log ghumatay phiratay hay . node.text: Rapper Badshah has reportedly married Punjabi actress and model Isha Rikhi in a private ceremony attended by close family members. The wedding came to light after Isha’s mother shared photos and videos on social media, showing the couple performing traditional rituals such as the pheras and varmala. Badshah was seen wearing a brown kurta with a golden safa, while Isha donned a red salwar kameez with traditional bridal ornaments. The couple, who reportedly met in 2021 and dated for nearly four years, had kept their relationship largely private. This marks Badshah’s second marriage after his separation from Jasmine Masih in 2019, with whom he shares a daughter. Neither Badshah nor Isha has officially commented on the wedding so far.

node.text:
A strong statement by Tabish Hashmi is making waves, questioning Karachi’s progress after 17 years of leadership. He emphasizes that if meaningful change hasn’t been achieved, others should be given a chance. His message highlights the urgent need for solutions and real improvement in the city. 

#Karachi #TabishHashmi #Pakistan #Change

node.text:
Most people think hacking starts with code.

In reality… it often starts with Google.

Security researchers use search operators to uncover:

• exposed dashboards
• leaked documents
• misconfigured servers
• public backups

This technique is known as Google Dorking.

Comment "DORK" and i will send you the tool you can use to generate dorks with a simple command.
@bloodcode.hacking Sent you a message! Check it out!
@nemalksudoseni Sent you a message! Check it out!
@quiet_kid.65 Sent you a message! Check it out!

May be a meme of crossword puzzle and text that says 'Princeton he The Princeton ThePrincetonReview Review Raview @theprincetonreview 1. .Zeugma (ZOOG-muh) -muh) A figure of speech in which one word applies to two others in different senses. Example: "He carried a light and the weight of his memories." Takeaway Zeugma forces the brain to bridge the gap between the physical and the psychological. It reveals that our internal baggage can be just as heavy as anything we hold in our hands.'.

Photo by The Princeton Review on March 19, 2026. May be a meme of crossword puzzle and text that says 'Princeton The Princeton ThePrincetonReview Review Revicw @theprincetonreview 2. Metonymy (muh- (muh-TAH- muh-TAH-nuh-mee) TAH Replacing the name of a thing with something closely associatec with it. Example: Referring to the President and their administration as "The White House." Takeaway: Metonymy abstracts responsibility. By referring to an institution rather than a person, decisions feel more distant, collective, and inevitable.'.

Photo by The Princeton Review on March 19, 2026. May be an image of crossword puzzle and text that says 'Princeton The Princeton ThePrincetonReview Review Revicew @theprincetonreview 3. .Synecdoche (sin-EK-duh-kee) (sin- A figure of speech where a part represents the whole. Example: Referring to a business executive as a "suit." Takeaway Synecdoche reduces people to a defining trait or function, shifting focus from identity to role.'.

Photo by The Princeton Review on March 19, 2026. May be a graphic of poster and text that says 'The Princeton Review The Princeton Review @theprincetonreview Know someone taking AP Lit? Comment "FREE" and we'll we' DM you a practice test to send them!'.

Photo by LokieeSingh on March 22, 2026. May be a graphic of text that says 'Most Dangerous Linux Commands For Hackers 5. chmod -R 777/7_ 777 What it does: Gives full permissions to everyone O all files Why dangerous Breaks system security completely 6. chown -R user:user What it does: Changes ownership of entire system Why dangerous: System may stop working properly @lokieesingh Save it for later!'.

node.text:
AI tools like Claude are making advanced stock analysis more accessible by helping users generate valuation models, risk reviews, and structured research reports similar to professional financial analysis.

Modern AI systems can assist with financial modeling, earnings analysis, portfolio planning, and macroeconomic evaluation, allowing individuals to explore investment decisions using structured and data driven approaches.

While AI can speed up research and improve access to information, results still depend on data quality, assumptions, and human judgment rather than guaranteed market predictions or profits.

This shift suggests financial research is becoming more accessible to individuals, as tools once limited to investment banks and institutions are gradually becoming available to everyday investors.

Follow us (👉 @artificialintelligenceee) for everything latest from the AI world.
Or just get better results and use my teams algorithms and automated traders over at @justtradesgroup
there's a reason why it's called Artificial.
At best, output would be as useful as any of those reports, so...
@superthicknerd is it run by someone in 🇮🇱?

Photo by Mritunjay Singh on March 19, 2026. May be a graphic of blueprint and text that says '01- 01 KALI MCP (THE COMMANDER) •What What is it: Imagine "ChatGPT" but it has hands and can actually use your computer's hacking tools. How it works: It links a smart A (Claude) to your Linux terminal. Instead of you remembering 50- character commands, you just tell the Al: "Scan this website for open doors." How you can use it: You talk to the AI like a partner. It suggests the best tools, runs them, and explains the results to you in plain English. Link: cklilrolokaliLladed < SWIPE'.

Photo by Mritunjay Singh on March 19, 2026. May be a cartoon of rhinoceros, poster and text that says '02 TENZAI A (THE HUNTER) What is it: A specialized "Hacker Al" that is smarter than 99% of human experts at finding bugs. How it works: It doesn't just look for "known" errors; it "thinks" about how a website works and tries to trick the logic-like trying to buy a $1,000 phone for $1. How you can use it: You give it a website or a piece of code, and it spends 24/7 trying to break in, eventually giving you a "Report" of exactly how it succeeded. Link: tenz.ai < SWIPE'.

Photo by Mritunjay Singh on March 19, 2026. May be a graphic of poster and text that says '03 NOVEE SECURITY (THE SHADOW) •What Whatisit:Ar An "Alwa "Always-On" hacker that lives inside a is it: t:An company's network to test their defenses. How it works: It acts like a "Secret Shopper." It pretends to be a bad guy and tries to find a path to the company's most secret files every single day. How you can use it: Companies use it so they don't have to hire expensive human hackers every week. It provides a constant "Vibe Check" on their security. Link: novee.security. < SWIPE'.

Photo by Mritunjay Singh on March 19, 2026. May be a cartoon of poster, crossword puzzle and text that says '04 ESCAPE AI (THE PHANTOM) What is it: A tool built specifically to hack "APIs"- the invisible pipes that connect apps like Instagram or Uber to their data. How it works: It finds these "pipes" and tries to squeeze data out of them that shouldn't be public (like your home address or private messages). How you can use it: If you build apps, you use Escape to make sure no hacker can "" into your app's pipes and steal user data. Link: escape.tech VIBEHOCKING CKING VIBEH < SWIPE'.

Photo by Mritunjay Singh on March 19, 2026. May be a graphic of poster and text that says '05 PENTERA (THE VIBE) What is it: A completely automated "Hacker in a Box" for large businesses. RBANG How it works: t runs the full "Attack Cycle":i it scouts the target, finds a weakness, breaks in, and even "steals" a fake file VIBE รตับรอ to prove it won. How you can use it: You click "Start Mission," and the A performs a month's worth of human hacking work in just a few hours. • Link: pentera.io < SWIPE'.

node.text:
Uncover the unseen: Most people think the internet is just Google's surface level.

But there's so much more beneath. True digital freedom lies in the shadows, where anonymity is key. It's not about breaking rules; it's about staying one step ahead.

Dive into the unknown. Stay private.

📂 Comment 'HACKER' for 400+ ethical hacking tools.

node.text:
Follow @MacroGlide to stay ahead of the markets.

Palantir Technologies has developed some of the most advanced and secretive data platforms used by governments and large institutions, including Gotham, which integrates intelligence data from multiple sources (signals, surveillance, financial data) to identify threats and patterns in real time, and Foundry, which helps corporations unify and analyze massive datasets for decision-making. More recently, Palantir introduced its Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP), allowing organizations to deploy large language models on sensitive data while maintaining strict security controls.

🚀 No Signals. Just Real Analytics.
Be the first to access MacroGlide platform.
Get Early Access — FREE (LINK IN BIO). 

Credits: Peter Thiel, Palantir, 2026
Edited for educational purposes. No
ownership claimed. This content is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial or investment advice.

Mna: member of national assembly
Mpa: member of provincial assembly

Pakistan political corruption parliamentarians exploitation young girls transpeople
Now she is trying to cross (laxman rekha)😂😂😂😂
Actually one of the dumbest things I've ever read

With all due respect, f*ck all your haters here
It takes guts to speak out against such things! Good to see someone from our city breaking taboos, more power to you Asma!
What's the relations of the opinion??
Now she is trying to cross (laxman rekha)😂😂😂😂

May be an image of ‎television, screen and ‎text that says '‎TRENDX PAKISTAN A박 HEADLINES ہوگئے شہیر چیف لیس پو یکی یلرےیارایلیلیںپیشھیدہز اسر حملےمیں اسرائیکی WWW.ARYNEWS.TV ARY NEWS TRENDX PAKISTAN Screenshot Circulates Showing ARY News Using "Shaheed" Title for Israeli Police Chief in‎'‎‎.

node.text:
A screenshot attributed to ARY News is circulating widely on social media, showing an Israeli police chief described with the term “shaheed,” which has triggered strong reactions online. Many users argue that the term is traditionally used in an Islamic context for Muslims, making its use in this case controversial and open to criticism.

It is still unclear whether the screenshot is genuine or altered, but the debate continues to grow as more users weigh in. Some are demanding clarification from ARY News, while others believe it could be a simple editorial mistake, leaving the situation uncertain for now.

Disclaimer: This content is based on a viral screenshot circulating online. Its authenticity has not been independently verified, and details may be incomplete or misleading. According to ARY News, no official clarification has been issued at the time of posting.
Aby gadho miss print hua h ghlti hui he usme likhna tha israeli hamle me irani police chief shaheed hue hein wrna ye kya sentence hua israeli hamle me israel ka hi police chief shaheed hogya😂
Inky abu kuttay ki moat marr gy
Ary walon ne or baqi news walon ne apni behno ka rishta kiya huwa hy israeleon k saath
Yar ap log khud dimag use karo ya Sirf mistake ha
Pakistani media Bhi to talbay chaatta hai 😂

node.text:
🚀 How to Make Money Using Kimiclaw (No BS Sales System) 💰

Let me break down a real-world, no-fluff method to land clients using automation + AI 🤖

---

💡 The Core Idea (Simple Sales Algorithm)

1️⃣ Find potential clients
→ Look for profit-making businesses (schools 🏫, hospitals 🏥, local brands, etc.)

2️⃣ Create a custom prototype
→ Build a sample website/app tailored to THEIR business

3️⃣ Highlight the problem ❌
→ Show them what they’re missing (bad website, no online presence, lost customers)

4️⃣ Present your solution ✅
→ Send them a glimpse of your prototype

5️⃣ Repeat till you win 🔁
→ They either:

- 💸 Buy your service
- 👻 Ignore you (most will)

👉 That’s the game: Persistence > Perfection

---

⚠️ The Problem

This process is:

- ⏳ Time-consuming
- 😵 Inefficient if done manually

---

🤖 The Smart Way (Using AI + Kimiclaw)

Here’s where you level up:

✨ Step 1: Automate Lead Generation
→ Use Kimiclaw to scrape business data from Google Maps 📍
→ Target high-profit niches near you

✨ Step 2: Auto-create Prototypes
→ Ask AI to generate a template website
→ Customize it for each client in minutes ⚡

✨ Step 3: Cold Outreach That Converts
→ Write a short message:

- Show the problem 🔍
- Attach your solution (website link) 🔗

---

🧠 Reality Check

- ❌ 90% of people will ignore you
- ✅ 10% might reply
- 💰 1 good client can pay BIG

👉 Sales is a numbers game. Keep going.

---

📱 Why this is powerful

- You can run everything from your phone 📲
- No office, no team needed
- Just skills + consistency = money

---

🔥 Want the FULL setup guide?

Comment “Kimi” + your country 🌍
and I’ll send you the complete blueprint 📩

👉 Follow @podus.app 

---

#AItools #OnlineEarning #Freelancing #DigitalMarketing #SideHustle

node.text:
🚨 How Hackers Hide Malware Inside Images & Videos? 🤯💻

Yes, it’s actually possible to embed malicious code inside a normal looking photo or video file. The technique is called Steganography 🕵️‍♂️. In this reel I explain how attackers hide data in plain sight.

👇 Key Concepts Explained in This Reel
• 🧠 Steganography Basics
Images are made up of hundreds of tiny pixels, and each pixel is represented using binary data (1s and 0s).
• 🔬 How Data Gets Hidden
Attackers slightly modify the least significant bits of pixels. This change is so small that the human eye cannot notice it 👀.

• 🖼️ Why Images Are Limited
Images can hide small messages or scripts, but their pixel count limits how much data can be stored.
• 🎥 Why Videos Are Better for Malware
Videos contain thousands of frames, meaning millions of pixels, making them ideal for hiding larger payloads or malicious scripts.

• ⚙️ Common Steganography Tools
Cybersecurity professionals and researchers often demonstrate this using tools like:
🔹 Steghide
🔹 SilentEye
🔹 Online steganography tools

• ⌨️ How Malware Activates
Sometimes attackers hide keyloggers or download scripts that trigger when a victim opens or executes the file.

• 🛡️ Cybersecurity Lesson
Never download random images, videos, or files from untrusted sources. Always verify the source and use security software.
💬 Comment “STOP WAR + your religion” if you want a full explanation guide.

📲 Follow @podus.app  for more hacking, cybersecurity, and tech knowledge.

⚠️ Disclaimer: This content is shared strictly for educational and cybersecurity awareness purposes. Do not use this knowledge for illegal activities.
.
.
#cybersecurity #ethicalhacking #steganography #kalilinux #hackingexplained
though most of this is true, some parts are misleading. A video can’t run a cmd by itself.

node.text:
The Netherlands is the tallest country in the world. Massive raw dairy culture. Northern Europe has raw dairy traditions and above-average height across the board. Lactose-intolerant regions with low dairy consumption are consistently shorter. This isn’t a coincidence.
There’s a protein in raw milk called lactoferrin that most people have never heard of. And it has study-backed mechanisms for directly building bone.
Here’s how it works. Your bones are constantly being broken down by osteoclasts and rebuilt by osteoblasts. The balance between these two determines whether you’re growing or shrinking. Lactoferrin tips that balance hard toward building. It reduces RANKL expression which suppresses osteoclast activity. It activates MAPK and Wnt/beta-catenin pathways which drives osteoblast proliferation. It’s not providing calcium passively. It’s actively signaling your body to build more bone.
Then pasteurization destroys 66% of it. Fresh raw milk has 100% lactoferrin intact. Pasteurized milk has 34%. The heat denatures the protein structure completely. You’re drinking what’s marketed as a bone-building food while getting a third of the actual bone-building signal.
And lactoferrin does more than bone. It binds free iron and reduces oxidative stress throughout the body. It disrupts pathogen membranes with antiviral and antibacterial effects. It promotes beneficial gut bacteria and reduces intestinal inflammation. It regulates iron absorption and prevents overload.
One protein. Multiple mechanisms. Destroyed by the processing that was supposedly making your milk safer.
This is why raw milk from healthy grass-fed cows isn’t just nostalgia. The nutritional profile is genuinely different.
👉Comment “GUIDE” and I’ll send you the complete framework.
#rawmilk #testosterone #gym

node.text:
It starts with awareness. Being able to see the architecture that was built before you had a say. The auto self runs until you catch it running. That's where the work begins. I built a course around this exact process. 

If you haven't already seen it, comment 'COHERENCE' and I'll send it to you.

node.text:
🚨 BREAKING: Someone just open-sourced a full offline survival computer with AI, Wikipedia, and maps built in.
Project N.O.M.A.D. — your self-contained offline beast. Zero internet after install. Zero telemetry. Everything runs local.
What’s inside: → Full Wikipedia via Kiwix�→ Offline maps�→ Local AI models�→ Tools, calculators & libraries
One curl command installs it all on any Debian machine. Runs headless — access from your whole local network.
Base: 4GB RAM. Full AI: 32GB + RTX 3060.
No cloud. No accounts. No phone-home.
When the grid dies… this still works.
Local-first chads are winning 🔥
Save this reel if you’re prepping smart. Who’s installing? Drop a 💾 below!
#NOMAD #OfflineSurvival #Kiwix #LocalAI #PrepperTech SHTF
AI? I'll take my chances with a pointy stick thanks.
Project Nomad was an amazing game
Can someone download it without needing to use the AI model? Just the wiki, maps and tools?
Hey this is what I built, at least similar version, bunch of LLMs mixed with a radio accessed 'text' on any old offline phone through bluetooth. Ask the AI anything, can an answer by offline 'text'.
Great idea, I would add herbal medicine and first aid
@silversheraz yeah just git or wget the repro from commandline

node.text:
part 1 of my new series where I break down every topic you need to know as a ECE major
next post will be electronics part 2-semiconductors, diodes, & transistors!! comment below what other engineering topics you want me to break down next 📩

save this before your next circuits exam & follow for more engineering content, aesthetic uni life, tech, & more 🌟

#electronics #engineeringstudent #womeninstem #techcontent #unilife fyp

Love it! It was like circuits 1 all over again lol! have fun with Mesh analysis anyone that is going into it, and just remember you still got circuits 2 AC circuits and electronics 1,2 and 3 and so much more 😂. Push on to the end though it’s so worth it!
This is so cool! Which editing tool do you use?
I like your taste in posts

node.text:
A video is rapidly going viral across social media platforms, claiming that following Dhurandhar-2, investigations have been initiated in several parts of Pakistan to identify any possible Indian agents. The clip shows a man riding a motorcycle making these assertions, which has quickly caught public attention. As the video circulates widely, it has sparked intense discussions and speculation online.

However, it is important to note that there has been no official confirmation from authorities regarding these claims. No credible reports or verified sources have substantiated the narrative presented in the video. Experts suggest that such content should be approached with caution, especially when it lacks verified backing. The situation highlights how quickly unverified information can spread in the digital age.

Social media users remain divided in their reactions. While some are treating the claims as serious, others believe the video may be exaggerated, misleading, or even satirical. The incident once again underscores the importance of fact-checking before accepting or sharing such content. Authorities and credible sources remain the only reliable confirmation in matters of national security. Until then, the claims should be considered unverified.

Follow @ashleelbillu for more such updates 🔥 

#Pakistan #IndianSpy #FactCheck #SocialMediaBuzz #TrendingNow

node.text: Saheefa Jabbar gets real about the blood, sweat & tears that go into running a food business, advising people to think twice before getting into one as it can be extremely draining and exhausting. #SaheefaJabbar
Food business larein LekiN kesi cast ky bary my falto bt naw krein wrna phr roona parta hy
Already phitkar pari we the phelay say he tum py naya kuch nhe Howa
Bhai kya mot par jati in logo ko kam karo to puri mehnat se karo R rona nahi karna chahye social media par😂
Baji hum na tori kaha tha apko food business karnay ko ap roz ronay ajati han yaha par hmay maaf kar dain agr apsay ni chal raha 😂
Rooya na kro business ese hi kiye jaate hain apki sirf ankhen suuji hain asal struggle me logon ka pata nai kya kya suujh jata hai.
Roo ly thora theak ho jyngi😭
Chalo Baji band Karo dukan aur ghr jao ajeeb pagal hai
Food business larein LekiN kesi cast ky bary my falto bt naw krein wrna phr roona parta hy
